name: Secrets
description: A 3d6 biography table of actionable secrets: hidden access, leverage, dangerous truths, and usable knowledge.

results.description: You know where proof was hidden that could ruin a powerful household if produced intact.
results.name: secrets

results.description: You know the private vice of someone publicly regarded as beyond reproach.
results.name: secrets

results.description: You know which servant, clerk, or guard can be bought and what price opens their mouth.
results.name: secrets

results.description: You know of a concealed entrance used by those who prefer not to be seen.
results.name: secrets

results.description: You know which local account books are false and who benefits from the lie.
results.name: secrets

results.description: You know where small valuables are usually hidden in respectable homes.
results.name: secrets

results.description: You know who meets in secret and roughly when they believe themselves safe.
results.name: secrets

results.description: You know which official inspections are real and which are only theater.
results.name: secrets

results.description: You know an old feud that still shapes present favors and resentments.
results.name: secrets

results.description: You know how certain letters, permits, or tallies are quietly altered after the fact.
results.name: secrets

results.description: You know what offering, phrase, or courtesy gets you listened to by the right sort of person.
results.name: secrets

results.description: You know that a public story about an important event is false in one crucial detail.
results.name: secrets

results.description: You know who disappeared with help rather than by force.
results.name: secrets

results.description: You know where forbidden, embarrassing, or politically dangerous records are kept.
results.name: secrets

results.description: You know the real cause of a death, fire, scandal, or collapse still blamed on the wrong person.
results.name: secrets

results.description: You know a truth that could shift loyalty, inheritance, prosecution, or patronage if revealed at the right time.
results.name: secrets
